title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a built-in model registry and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same feature parity as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama LLM, embedder and retriever components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoint proxy).

title: ollama-cli (sugarforever/ollama-cli)
summary: Interactive terminal UI (TUI) for chatting with Ollama models built with Python Textual.

title: ollama-copilot (cmiller01/ollama-copilot)
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rag (glangchain/ollama-rag)
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented-Generation template combining Ollama embeddings + ChromaDB.

title: ollama4j (ollama4j/ollama4j)
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; non-blocking and streaming support.

title: ollama-rs (pepperoni21/ollama-rs)
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: Ollama discussion: ‘New tool call support’
summary: Reddit thread announcing beta support for OpenAI-style function-calling in Ollama mainline.

title: ollama-haystack (anakin87/ollama-haystack)
summary: Haystack integration by the community; use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook (langchain-ai/ollama-cookbook)
summary: Collection of recipes showing Ollama + LangChain patterns (RAG, agents, structured output).

title: ollama-camunda (falko/ollama-camunda)
summary: Community project embedding Ollama as a Camunda external task worker for BPMN AI tasks.

title: ollama-n8n-node (n8n-io/n8n-nodes-ollama)
summary: Official n8n community node to integrate Ollama prompts and embeddings into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-helm (tyzbit/ollama-helm)
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling options.

title: ollama-docker (ollama/ollama-docker)
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples (CPU & GPU) maintained in the main repo.

title: ollama-hnsw (marcusschiesser/ollama-hnsw)
summary: Lightweight vector search helper that combines Ollama embeddings with fast HNSWLib for Node apps.
